name: Menderes Tekstil Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi
summary: Menderes Tekstil Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi produces and sells home textiles, upholstery fabrics, and lining and interlining products in Turkey. It offers beddings, linens, pillow cases, sleep sets, curtains, baby sets, table cloths, woven and knitted fabrics, polyester and cotton mix fabrics, draperies, collar linings, fusible garment linings, and high-strength parasols, as well as specialty technical home textile products, including water-proof, dirt-stain proof, permanent antibacterial, and patient underpads. The company provides its products under the La Notte, Cotton Collection, SNT, SNT Gold, Topline, and Menderes Fabrics brands. It also exports its products. The company was founded in 1958 and is based in Izmir, Turkey. Menderes Tekstil Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi is a subsidiary of Ak√É¬ßa Holding A.S.
